message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'vlan_insert_tag_set_proto' sets signal field '(unnamed class/struct/union).protocol', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=(unnamed class/struct/union);field=protocol;offset=48] [oracle:assert=(unnamed class/struct/union).protocol stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets protocol without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
